last_verified_state: Initial project setup — all gates green

_comments.schema_version: Protocol version. Must match pattern vaultit-v<major>.<minor>. Consumers check this before parsing.
_comments.project: URL-safe slug. Used as directory name in the bridge repo (e.g. projects/my-project/).
_comments.project_type: One of: web_app, ml_pipeline, research_notebook, data_pipeline, mobile_app, cli_tool, library, course_module, other.
_comments.local_path: Absolute path on the operator's machine. AI uses this for cd commands.
_comments.state_machine_status: Current lifecycle state. IDLE = no active work. EXECUTING = task in progress. PROTOCOL_BREACH = illegal transition detected.
_comments.active_task_id: Unique task identifier (e.g. TASK-0001). Null when IDLE.
_comments.active_task_title: Human-readable task title. Null when IDLE.
_comments.current_blocker: What is preventing progress. Null if unblocked. Be specific — this is the first thing the next session reads.
_comments.last_verified_state: Plain-English description of the last state where ALL gates passed. This is the rollback target.
_comments.gates: Array of shell commands. Every command must exit 0 before any state transition. Order matters — run sequentially.
_comments.last_updated: ISO 8601 date. Updated every time this file changes.
_comments.repo: GitHub URL or 'local only'. Used by sync tooling to locate the source repo.
_comments.branch: Active git branch. Null if not using git or branch is unknown.
_comments.repo_head_sha: Short SHA of the latest commit. Used to detect drift between sessions.
_comments.effective_verified_sha: Short SHA of the last commit that passed all gates. May differ from repo_head_sha if recent commits haven't been validated.
_comments.environment: Runtime details. Helps AI set up the correct environment without guessing.
_comments.team: Who is doing what. executor = AI or human running the task. auditor = reviewer. operator = project owner.
